meaning: v.<书>杀,杀死,宰杀,杀害,宰杀,杀死
examples: Those old movies still slay me!
The wicked watcheth the righteous, and seeketh to slay him.
Her goal: to slay 21 Yankees, one for each year of her beau's life.
Instead of tilting at windmills we need to slay the dragons we know exist.
They slay the dreamer, pat him on the back and hope he goes away.
